# Summary
- What does this change do?

# Why
- Why is this change needed?

# How
- Key implementation notes (bullets are fine)

# Test Plan
- [ ] `python -m pytest`
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- Notes / evidence (paste command output or describe)

# Screens / Artifacts (if applicable)
- Links to exports, screenshots, sample output

# Risk / Rollback
- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Rollback plan:

# Checklist
- [ ] I did not push to `main`
- [ ] CI should pass (tests + ruff)
- [ ] Docs updated if operator/dev workflow changed
